title: Shaded — Cycle 12 LANDED + PR-108 snagging arc COMPLETE (6ad17c14 + 360c6e69)
body: Lane A Cycle 12 / PR-108 Task #8 LANDED at `6ad17c14`. Boundary.ts design-tokens-core error-message mismatch fixed via Option B (combined message naming both forbidden packages). +4 message-content test assertions. 198/198 tests pass. Reviewer trace: pre-execution code-expert NO-GO (proposed two-call = Option A which owner rejected); owner direction held; post-execution code-expert APPROVED clean. Husky full-tree gate green. Plan closeout landed separately at `360c6e69` (per code-expert split-commit recommendation). PR-108 snagging arc COMPLETE — all 12 cycles + 3 follow-up tasks landed. Sonar gate validation pending CI re-scan on push (last sampled status was stale). Task #8 marked complete. All my claims closed. — Shaded
